zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Castell Sr.於大約1430年出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾易亞斯特 哈特利時，他的父親Thomas James Castell21歲，母親Anne Humberton21歲。他於大約1450年與Agnes gift de Castell結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1504年在他的家鄉享年75歲。

nameMeanings.name: Castell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Roberto, Amarilys, Carlos, Eduardo, Estevan, Francisco, Guadalupe, Humberto, Jorge, Manuel, Mateo, Pablo.
English and Scottish: variant of   Castle  .

Manx: shortened form of Gaelic Mac Asgaill ‘son of Ásketill’, an Old Norse personal name composed of the elements áss ‘god’ + ketill ‘sacrificial cauldron, helmet’. The Manx surname is cognate with Scottish Gaelic McAskill .

variants.name: Castille
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alcee, Antoine, Armand, Maudry, Michel, Monique, Normand, Remy, Renella.
Americanized form of Catalan   Castell  , under the French influence in LA.
French: habitational name from the French name for Castile in Spain (see   Castilla  ).

variants.name: Castle
meanings: English: topographic name from Anglo-Norman French, Middle English castel ‘castle, fortified building or set of buildings’, especially the residence of a feudal lord (from Late Latin castellum, a diminutive of castrum ‘fort, Roman walled city’). The name would also have denoted a servant who lived and worked at such a place, or someone who had an obligation to provide services or rent to a castle.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Castell Sr. was born about 1430, in East Hatley, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas James Castell, was 21 and his mother, Anne Humberton, was 21. He married Agnes gift de Castell about 1450. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1504, in his hometown, at the age of 75.

Il a épousé Agnes gift de Castell environ 1450. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1504, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 75 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Castell Sr.(이)가 대략 1430년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 이스트 하틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas James Castell(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Humberton(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1450년 Agnes gift de Castell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1504년 그의 고향에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Castell Sr. родился около 1430 г. в местности эаст хатли, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas James Castell было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Anne Humberton, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes gift de Castell около 1450 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1504 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 75 лет.
